title: A Day at the Science Museum
article_text: The tube train was crowded, so we grabbed a seat near the tower. The museum's main tower was very tall, and we could see the whole city from it. An infant was crying, but his mother calmed him down. The operator of the exhibit explained how to spin the wheel. He said that he had anticipated the large crowd and had prepared extra tickets. The virus exhibit showed how a virus can infect a cell. We had to dig through our bags to find the tickets. We had to drag a heavy box to the next room. We mounted a model rocket on a stand. The guide told us that the exact height of the tower was 300 meters. The scientist characterized the new virus precisely. He specified that the virus was dependent on a host cell. The anxiety in the room was high because of the exposure to the virus. I wish I had specialized in biology earlier. If I had studied more, I would have understood the exhibit better. The chicken display showed how chickens grow. The angle of the camera was perfect for the photo. The operator lent us a special tool to wrap the wire. The involvement of the visitors was very high. The museum was entitled to charge an extra fee for the special show.

sentences.en: The tube train was crowded, so we grabbed a seat near the tower.
sentences.zh: 地铁列车很拥挤，所以我们抢到了靠近塔楼的座位。

words.eng_def: a tall, narrow building or structure

sentences.en: The museum's main tower was very tall, and we could see the whole city from it.
sentences.zh: 博物馆的主塔非常高，从上面我们可以看到整个城市。

words.eng_def: a tall, narrow building or structure

sentences.en: An infant was crying, but his mother calmed him down.
sentences.zh: 一个婴儿在哭，但他妈妈让他平静了下来。

sentences.en: The operator of the exhibit explained how to spin the wheel.
sentences.zh: 展品的操作员解释了如何转动轮子。

words.eng_def: a person who controls a machine or system

sentences.en: He said that he had anticipated the large crowd and had prepared extra tickets.
sentences.zh: 他说他预料到了大量人群，并准备了额外的门票。

sentences.en: The virus exhibit showed how a virus can infect a cell.
sentences.zh: 病毒展品展示了病毒如何感染细胞。

words.eng_def: a very small living thing that causes disease

sentences.en: We had to dig through our bags to find the tickets.
sentences.zh: 我们不得不翻遍包去找门票。

words.eng_def: to move earth or search inside something

sentences.en: We had to drag a heavy box to the next room.
sentences.zh: 我们不得不把一个重箱子拖到隔壁房间。

words.eng_def: to pull something heavy along the ground

sentences.en: We mounted a model rocket on a stand.
sentences.zh: 我们把一个模型火箭安装在一个架子上。

words.eng_def: put something in a fixed position

sentences.en: The guide told us that the exact height of the tower was 300 meters.
sentences.zh: 导游告诉我们塔的精确高度是300米。

sentences.en: The scientist characterized the new virus precisely.
sentences.zh: 科学家精确地描述了这种新病毒的特征。

words.eng_def: in an exact and accurate way

sentences.en: He specified that the virus was dependent on a host cell.
sentences.zh: 他明确指出这种病毒依赖于宿主细胞。

sentences.en: The anxiety in the room was high because of the exposure to the virus.
sentences.zh: 由于接触病毒，房间里的人非常焦虑。

words.eng_def: a feeling of worry or fear
the state of being affected by something

sentences.en: I wish I had specialized in biology earlier.
sentences.zh: 我希望我早点专攻生物学。

sentences.en: If I had studied more, I would have understood the exhibit better.
sentences.zh: 如果我学得更多，我就能更好地理解这个展品了。

sentences.en: The chicken display showed how chickens grow.
sentences.zh: 鸡的展示区展示了鸡是如何生长的。

sentences.en: The angle of the camera was perfect for the photo.
sentences.zh: 相机的角度非常适合拍照。

words.eng_def: the direction from which you look at something

sentences.en: The operator lent us a special tool to wrap the wire.
sentences.zh: 操作员借给我们一个特殊工具来缠绕电线。

words.eng_def: gave something to someone for a short time

sentences.en: The involvement of the visitors was very high.
sentences.zh: 参观者的参与度非常高。

words.eng_def: the act of taking part in something

sentences.en: The museum was entitled to charge an extra fee for the special show.
sentences.zh: 博物馆有权为特别展览收取额外费用。

words.eng_def: having the right to do something

Which word means 'a very young child'?

image_prompts: A crowded tube train with people standing and sitting, a tall tower visible through the window.
A very tall museum tower with a viewing platform, people looking at the city below.
A mother holding a crying infant in a museum, calming the baby down.
A museum exhibit with an operator showing how to spin a large wheel.
A museum guide speaking to a crowd, holding extra tickets, anticipating many visitors.
A museum exhibit showing a virus infecting a cell, with colorful graphics.
People digging through their bags to find tickets at a museum entrance.
Two people dragging a heavy box across a museum floor to the next room.
A person mounting a model rocket on a stand in a museum workshop.
A guide pointing to a sign that says 'Height: 300 meters' near a tall tower.
